Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Spirit Wracked Cord

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Chardok
NPC Name
Grand Lorekeeper Kino Shai`din


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Chardok


Uploaded June 1st, 2020 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
still drops
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2015 at 8:27 PM Rating: Decent
LendersBagels
8 posts
Just to confirm

Dropped from Grand Loremaster Kino Shai`Din two nights ago.
I camped him off and on throughout the week. By my estimate I saw 35 'an apprentice lorekeeper' phs, 15 'Loremaster Piza`tak', and on the 7th Kino spawn it dropped.
26 minute spawn. Be persistent and it'll drop in time.
▲ Page top
aura of battle
QuoteReply
# May 09 2010 at 2:34 AM Rating: Decent
Discordia
145 posts
Finished this today and the aura of battle effect is no longer listed on the item description. Nerfed?
▲ Page top
aura of battle
QuoteReply
# May 09 2010 at 3:22 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1683505057533
Sage
672 posts
Aura of Battle has been replaced years ago by stright stat modifiers; in this case by ATK+10 and HP regen. So it's just the pic that's slightly outdated, but technically still correct.
▲ Page top
Cheaters never prosper
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2004 at 7:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1679271392283
Scholar
308 posts
Lol this damn thing keeps showing up on almost every item upgrade search I do just because it's all/all and can by thrown in three different slots, AND has an effect. I think this little baby is hedging it's bets a little...
▲ Page top
Drusella
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2004 at 10:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786682990
23 posts
Soloed drusella with my sk, max hit was around 316, average hit (1553 ac) was 246-266. She either casts or procs a life tap that can hit for 350~ (hit me for an average of 130, she's either a necro or a shadowknight, probably a necro though.). She has around 11k hp (8k ht took her from 89% to 3%).

She does have a pet (typically unless you catch her right when we spawns). She spawns in the room with the Four golems (two on left, two on right, might be other mobs there, roamers roam constantly through that area.)

she can be single pulled, although you're going to have to pacify/fd pull to get it. The life tap can make this fight nasty though, it either has a super fast cast time, or a high proc rate(whichever it is)

I got lucky, dropped the belt, mirror and urn first try. Also, the glove is on the floor in this room, for the master key.

Good hunting
▲ Page top
Drussella Urn
QuoteReply
# May 26 2003 at 10:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250712391
2 posts
Got the urn on my 4th kill

# Feb 22 2004 at 3:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593374966959

Scholar
91 posts
I was going to get the glove to finish the Hand of Glory quest and she was up, along with the named golem thing. Charmed it and sicked it on her and she dropped the Urn.

Sadly I'm max kos to chardok and just came here to see what it was for. /sigh. Nice item though!

It took me 6 kills for her to drop the urn. I've grown to hate Drusella Sathir.
▲ Page top
difficult?
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2003 at 3:47 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760034648
4 posts
Howmany people does it take to take drusilla down? And how hard does she hit/what spells does she cast? Really want some spirit wracked cords though it seems the urn is pretty rare.
▲ Page top
RE: difficult?
QuoteReply
# Sep 06 2003 at 1:28 PM Rating: Decent
Boop
View User Forum
114 posts
Dru can be done solo by say....an enchanter or a necro. They would probably need HP buffs and C3 or better to do it, but mainly, if they can get to drus room safely and pull her single, then they already did the hard part.

I havent done her since revamp, but before that, I kept my pet cleric parked by her door and would run my rog in to check her status. If she was up, cleric gets logged on, kill roamer asap, lull all around dru, pull dru and kill. Was a very easy fight...be sure to root her or snare if you can as she will turn and run at low hitpoints and...I nearly got toasted by that before....luckly, only agroed 2 of her guards as she ran into room before I killed her....now I keep her rooted at all times below 25pct health.

From what I understand, she can hit in the 300's for highs. Before I think it was 190ish or so on my rog...1240ish AC. As I said, havent fought her since revamp, but if other mobs are any comparison for upgrade, then she is a LITTLE tougher, but nothing most anyone doing this quest can handle easily. WIth no clarity, my cleric stayed nearly 80pct mana in most of the fights I had with her when I found her up...and most of that mana was wasted on root.
▲ Page top

That's odd, you have to kill Drusella in Howling stones (aka charasis) But to get the HS key, you need to kill the sarnak guy in LoIO...

# May 24 2002 at 5:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758554395
180 posts
This item is NOT wrist only, it may be equipped in the wrist, arm, or shoulder slot.


EDIT: yes that's right it was not listed when i posted this, it must have been added immediately after.
